Sports Scene

Copied

A total of 13 gold medals will be decided on July 28 at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics. CGTN Sports Scene recommends the following competitions:

First, the women's skateboarding street final will take place at the Place de la Concord at 17:00 (GMT+2).

Less than a quarter-hour later, the women's archery team final will be contested at Les Invalides at 17:11 (CMT+2).

Then at 20:30 (GMT+2), two of the most eye-catching swimming events of the day â the men's 400-meter individual medley final and women's 100-meter butterfly final â will get underway at the Olympic Aquatics Centre in the Paris La Defense Arena.

And at 22:15 (GMT+2) at the Grand Palais, the best-performing fencer will win the men's epee individual gold medal.
